  1. RestaurantGame

Uses of Package
RestaurantGame

Packages that use RestaurantGame
Package
Description
RestaurantGame
 
  • Classes in RestaurantGame used by RestaurantGame
    Class
    Description
    Basket
    A Basket is a generic container that stores ingredients of type T up to a specified limit.
    Burger
    The Burger class represents a stack of toppings.
    CookableToppings
    An abstract class for toppings that can be cooked.
    Countdown
    Countdown creates two types of timer: 1.
    Customer
    Customer defines the required behaviors for all customer types in the game.
    KnownCustomer
    An abstract base class for special customers who have known to the restaurant, predefined attributes such as name, shape, color, personality, and a favorite order.
    KnownCustomer.Personality
     
    Oven
    A generic Oven class that stores a limited number of ingredients of type T.
    Patty.CookingState
     
    Player
    CSC 335, Fall 2025 file Player.java: This class is creates a player for the Restaurant game.
    PlayerList
    This class stores players in a HashMap using their names as keys.
    RestaurantController
    CSC 335, Fall 2025 file RestaurantController.java: This class is responsible to controls the game and acess the functions through the RestaurantModel.java file.
    RestaurantModel
    RestaurantModel provides variables and methods to represent the player for the Restaurant, the current Customers and Tickets for a given day, the various Toppings used to fulfill Tickets, and variables to track the score, timing, income, and milestones for a day.
    Ticket
    A Ticket represents a customer's order.
    Toppings
    An abstract base class representing a topping ingredient.
